---
name: Release readiness check
about: Track public-release readiness gaps
title: "[Release readiness]: "
labels: release-readiness
assignees: ""
---

## Area

- [ ] Install / first run
- [ ] Build / lint / tests
- [ ] Public leaderboard trust gate
- [ ] Quarantine / unverified evidence labeling
- [ ] Documentation / positioning
- [ ] Security / privacy
- [ ] UI / accessibility
- [ ] Packaging / release notes

## Finding

Describe the release-readiness issue.

## Evidence

Include command output, screenshots, file paths, or endpoint responses. Do not include secrets, private prompts, bearer tokens, or raw sensitive run bundles.

## Expected Public-Release Behavior

What should a first public release do instead?

## Severity

- [ ] Blocker
- [ ] Should fix before public announcement
- [ ] Nice polish after release

## Verification Plan

What command, test, or manual check verifies the issue is fixed?
